title: Smoky Grilled BBQ Chicken
description: A classic American BBQ dish featuring smoky grilled chicken, juicy tomatoes, and a savory twist.
instructions: Season the chicken breasts with salt, pepper, and garlic.
Brush the grill grates with a little oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
While the chicken is cooking, brush the tomatoes and red onion with a little BBQ sauce.
Grill the tomatoes and red onion for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they're slightly charred.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing it thinly.
Serve the sliced chicken on top of the grilled tomatoes and red onion, drizzled with additional BBQ sauce if desired.
Sprinkle brown sugar over the top to balance the smokiness.
Enjoy your delicious Smoky Grilled BBQ Chicken!
